data.name: 능동 공간 뇌와 일반화 가능한 동작 소뇌를 통한 휴머노이드 전신 조작
GentleHumanoid: Learning Upper-body Compliance for Contact-rich Human and Object Interaction
산업용 로봇 안전 요구사항의 진화: ISO 10218-1/2(2011 대 2025) 비교 분석 및 ISO/TS 15066 통합

data.description: GentleHumanoid: Learning Upper-body Compliance for Contact-rich Human and Object Interaction mentions Model Predictive Control (MPC).
GentleHumanoid: Learning Upper-body Compliance for Contact-rich Human and Object Interaction uses Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).
Robotics and The Rare Earth Bottleneck cites or references GentleHumanoid: Learning Upper-body Compliance for Contact-rich Human and Object Interaction.
GentleHumanoid: Learning Upper-body Compliance for Contact-rich Human and Object Interaction mentions Whole-Body Control (WBC).
GentleHumanoid: Learning Upper-body Compliance for Contact-rich Human and Object Interaction is based on or uses Standard Quadratic Program (QP).

Evolution of Safety Requirements in Industrial Robotics: Comparative Analysis of ISO 10218-1/2 (2011 vs. 2025) and Integration of ISO/TS 15066 cites or references GentleHumanoid: Learning Upper-body Compliance for Contact-rich Human and Object Interaction.
Bank of America Institute — Humanoid Robots 101 cites or references GentleHumanoid: Learning Upper-body Compliance for Contact-rich Human and Object Interaction.

Humanoid Whole-Body Manipulation via Active Spatial Brain and Generalizable Action Cerebellum cites or references GentleHumanoid: Learning Upper-body Compliance for Contact-rich Human and Object Interaction.
